title: geranium pallidum
intro: Geranium pallidum, also known as the pale geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating issues related to the skin, such as acne, wounds, and eczema, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Geranium pallidum include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antiseptic properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Geranium pallidum include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally, depending on the specific health concern being addressed.
